flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Chaminade University of Honolulu fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (65.7% → 55.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Chaminade University of Honolulu rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($27.5k → $30.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Chaminade University of Honolulu rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($27.5k → $30.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Chaminade University of Honolulu fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).
